curation_notes: The patch commit is the merge commit of PR #2663 into the 1.4.x branch. Two source files were modified: statement_iterator.rs (moved column name population from the constructor to a lazy method called after sqlite3_step) and stmt.rs (corrected the lifetime annotation on field_name to reflect SQLite's actual pointer validity semantics). Locations derived directly from the patch diff. CHANGELOG, Cargo.toml, and test config changes were excluded.
